name: BTC 5m Crowded Unwind Reversal
edge_rationale: Crowding plus a large directional 5m move can represent forced unwind. If the move fails to continue and snaps back through the event midpoint, the exhausted forced flow may create mean-reversion edge.
counterparty_or_market_mechanism: Leveraged traders liquidated or forced to chase the directional move lose when the unwind exhausts and price snaps back.
frozen_assumptions: 5m candles define event and confirmation windows.
OI and funding are used only as past-known context when available.
Historical force orders are loaded from research_lab/data/crowded_unwind_backtest.db when available.
Candle range and volume remain required to confirm price displacement around the force-order spike.
No production, PAPER, runtime, core, execution, or settings changes.
No parameter rescue after seeing results.
expected_observation: If the setup works, 5m forced unwind reversals generate materially more trades than 15m trial-00095 while preserving ER, PF, drawdown, and cost sensitivity.
failure_modes: Volume and candle range proxies do not represent true liquidation flow.
Reversal entries catch continuation rather than exhaustion.
SHORT-only results are fragile given prior short-side weakness.
Edge is concentrated in isolated market stress events.
author: Codex
